items.title: The bundling pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR subgraph Source A["app.tsx"] B["components/*"] C["node_modules deps"] end Source --> D["Bundler"] D --> E["transpile TS->JS"] E --> F["tree-shake"] F --> G["minify"] G --> H["code-split chunks"] H --> I["optimized bundles
for the browser"]
items.caption: The bundler builds a module graph, then transpiles, removes dead code, minifies and splits it into fast-loading chunks.
